compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing tests for complexity evaluator new output fields
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description
Add 3 new test functions to tests/skills/test_complexity_evaluator_agent.py that assert the complexity evaluator Output Schema section contains pattern_familiarity, external_boundary_count, and feasibility_review_recommended fields with their type descriptions.

**Test approach**: Parse the markdown body of complexity-evaluator.md, extract the Output Schema section, verify each field name and its type constraint appear.

Tests must FAIL (RED) since the fields do not yet exist in the agent definition.

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test_complexity_evaluator_agent.py — Edit (add 3 test functions)

## TDD Requirement
Write 3 failing tests:
- test_complexity_evaluator_output_schema_has_pattern_familiarity
- test_complexity_evaluator_output_schema_has_external_boundary_count
- test_complexity_evaluator_output_schema_has_feasibility_review_recommended

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 3 new test functions exist
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && grep -c 'def test_complexity_evaluator_output_schema_has_' tests/skills/test_complexity_evaluator_agent.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] Tests fail (RED)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && poetry run pytest tests/skills/test_complexity_evaluator_agent.py -k 'output_schema_has' --tb=no -q 2>&1 | grep -q 'failed'

**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence in your understanding of the work, approach, or intent.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — RED tests committed and pushed.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
